channel.name: PAS IN Maidstone

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: PASAPI XSLT Step
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
LOCAL-4-0 <xsl:value-of select="translate(concat(translate(substring(//PID.5.5,1,1), $vLower, $vUpper),translate(substring(//PID.5.5,2), $vUpper, $vLower)),'"','')"/>
GB HOME
V81999 G9999981

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: VisitDate
VisitTime
UpdateOnly
VisitStatusXML
Check for warnings
PatientId

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "msg['MSH']['MSH.9']['MSH.9.2'].toString()" equals "A01" or "A05" or "A08"

channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
